source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Kwik-E-Mart, the grocery delivery app at http://localhost:3009 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Shop at the Price Chopper store and add both of these to your cart: 6 Kombucha (12oz) and 2 French Green Lentils.
